Doğuş University showed its difference in volleyball too

Doğuş University men’s volleyball team won one more cup for our university. Remaining unbeaten in 2017-2018 season, our team became the champion by eliminating many of its opponents. Twenty universities competed in the tournament organized by Turkish University Sports Federation. The volleyball team won the cup by defeating Yıldız Technical University 3-1 in the semi-finals.

We congratulate our students and thank them for bringing pride to our university.
